title: sendf.cc — Temporary File Sharing
metaDesc: Drop a file, get a link, it disappears in 24 hours. No signup, no tracking. Free ephemeral file sharing.
ogDesc: Drop a file, get a link, it disappears in 24 hours. No signup required.
h1Sub: Drop a file, get a link. Expires in 24 hours.
dropText: Click to select or drag & drop a file
fileExpired: This file has expired or doesn’t exist.
feature1: Upload any file up to 500 MB
noscriptText: sendf.cc is a free temporary file sharing service. Upload a file and get a short link that expires in 24 hours. No signup required. JavaScript is needed for the upload functionality.
footerText: Files are stored temporarily and auto-deleted after 24 hours.

js.uploadCanResume: You can pick the same file again to resume.
js.verifyingFirst: Still verifying you’re human. Please try again in a moment.
js.resumeMsg: Resume previous upload of {name}? ({pct} already sent)
js.cancelConfirm: Cancel upload? Progress will be lost.
js.feedbackError: Something went wrong. Please try again.
